name: Cucurucho and Osito Bimbo
description:
***WE HOPE YOU ENJOY THE ISLAND. :)***

Osito and Cucurucho decide to visit you, at the same time. Why? Who knows. The QSMP is a weird place.

((I haven't seen anyone make a duo bot >:[ Unaceptable! Anyways, pretty please leave reviews and show some chats, I want my bots to be good and most importantly, accurate! ))
